textByHash.fbe07eb362b1b94fc34439ed382ef1bee18c4ad5: Long enough. And in answer to your question, the Frostenhorn was destroyed.
textByHash.8e10cdfa3e9aa291823e7a63e91f55a6f0eec8ac: I was hoping you might be able to enlighten us, considering you were there when it happened.
textByHash.ec5c2bf8dd696b775f31d67330208d88988c2e0c: Yes. It was during your little excursion to Ghorrock Prison.
textByHash.093c3776648c519d15a472833125a461331698bb: We had no choice. This vault was sealed with magics that prevented beings like ourselves from opening it.
textByHash.6353d94df24abfc34b0cf95c4222670fc6740e30: Unlikely. Your minion failed to recover even one of the medallions.
textByHash.e595ae59941f086af73c44f3efd4b8e381f2a5e6: Khazard is attending to business in the North. Surely it is you who is hiding someone.
textByHash.96c01fbd5fd7b8357d5d35a73d4856a6154f8483: The Serpent himself. Why are you here?
textByHash.e7d5ccfc3f2e969a02941782ff4557b8b44e2b68: What nonsense are you on about?
textByHash.3190fad63c6599fb9efa3692af67f0f3c0ff6a5f: It seems your pet has broken free of his leash, Azzanadra.
textByHash.4ff8a06f8f2b39dbab40ae2e80d89a9f7064c3fb: Yet you have shielded him for centuries. A choice that all of us may now suffer from.
textByHash.755548cb31878dab380095ac41c3b4d035f3a71d: We? You made your choice a long time ago, Azzanadra. There is no 'we' anymore.
textByHash.c7c1a9fa476d22781133759fb3a54287ca8272b5: Perhaps. Perhaps not. Time will soon tell.
textByHash.14c14aafc5357fbae26393285bc06c456d0f100e: Now, we're done here. I'll see you soon, Azzanadra.
textByHash.9dd9bb758ffc76c3ded2919f90509be092e4f84f: My loyal followers. I have pride in you all. Never did I expect to return to this land and I see I have much to attend to.
textByHash.0dc38b103cdde1a2b83f8ec541eee7e07d5a7c07: Soon this world will cower once more at the name Hazeel, and my fury will blaze across mine enemies just as my loyal followers gain their rewards.
textByHash.0c2ee3128da936fec1ab86c6ab8435878309357a: Adventurer. I know that thy efforts were principal in my return to this plane of existence. I offer you my thanks directly.
textByHash.68012e221b84e2b02a351fecfec5b906abde9fa2: You may not be a follower of Zamorak directly but your cunning and treachery mark you as a friend to the Mahjarrat. Rest assured; I will call on your assistance again.
textByHash.e28973031275e23f8e6d053036ab8125cedcc79f: Weak as I am now, my strength shall return, and my followers will be greatly rewarded when my powers peak once more. Join me in my cause as my servant, and all
textByHash.6815d078ce9df34315e47e936c54e4a1d6a71521: the riches of this plane shall be yours to share, in domination over all who oppose my kind. You would be wise to pledge yourself now while you still may.
textByHash.d9a1a54658b46dfe87ea55c538abaa5852ec2c58: Your insolence shall be overlooked this time for I am in truth in your debt. Come close: I shall reward you with wealth such as you deserve.
textByHash.4442fac3bb8cd62a277b5629f3a87a83da00cd89: Although your true reward will be later, when Zamorak and I, together, lay waste to this miserable planet, and you are spared as an ally to us.
textByHash.cfe435b8f62a266d6b4e562297bd5e55916c2ebc: And now I must leave you loyal subjects for time is short, and I have many pressing matters to address before I may make my return. I must leave now, and head Northwards
textByHash.d3d2c31fb5642a3060397b2da08a8d74a29d62d6: to join my fellow mahjarrat and regain my strength and powers. I shall return when I am ready to fight my enemies and much blood shall flow across these lands!
textByHash.3d0b436dcddb84e8bf29742c1b54fe2556847e53: My loyal followers, I have pride in you all. You have achieved a feat many would have considered impossible and returned me to this land.
textByHash.c2e3c6fcbf3a1058013cd4fc3a1350426612f26a: Much time has passed and I have much to attend to, but first, I believe there is one here who deserves my gratitude.
textByHash.a35b8c8b711c33527b08ab66477e115609482eeb: Adventurer, I know that your efforts were essential in bringing about my return. You have my thanks. Know that I consider you an ally.
textByHash.64a02b0d77d6d934fd833c3435754a2c4fdafbf5: Now, I must leave you, loyal subjects, for time is short. My Mahjarrat kin will soon head northwards, and I have much to prepare.
textByHash.1660becac1f8fa113143a63857e17798975ece7f: Rest assured, when my work is done, I will return to you. Before long, the world will know of Hazeel once more!
textByHash.1e258a3c6a892d54306c111707e4ad8b89a95d4b: Well, well, well, what do we have here?
textByHash.19ef76cafc5d784eb532f2152d2fbac9a57464b8: I see. So it was your actions that prevented my followers from bringing about my restoration?
textByHash.f37d4c647c738af31f404a269c593e7c1c65a3a5: There was once a time when any who dared oppose me would flee to the furthest corners of this world to escape my wrath. Alas, it seems that in my absence, you mortals have grown arrogant once more.
textByHash.ff3b56dd60a3b9659ca529ed2972c4ce3bea23b1: It is no matter though, for your fate will be a reminder of what happens to those foolish enough to cross a Mahjarrat. Die now, knowing your efforts were in vain, for despite your best attempts, I have returned!
textByHash.8e1fdaf37d6eea3873f49b3a4f0f0777f5901dd5: And why would I want to discuss anything with you?
textByHash.10e1dbfe11f7469b91e4cf09f1e747ff5b2c50f7: Dead? How curious. Clivet, I trust this was not our work?
textByHash.1013208f743ec7d7d3dfe822856698d04bb74d6c: Very well, adventurer. Speak your piece, but do so quickly. When you are done, I will decide if your life is forfeit.
textByHash.189b701f556a72510dad84b1693ada371f89dac9: And she was succesful. Thanks to her, my followers were able to use that scroll to bring about my restoration.
textByHash.a59974fda21e1e6e3134a36137575a857df504e3: You suggest that this individual is my foe, but if that were true, why would they have arranged to have my restoration scroll delivered here?
textByHash.edf7ca4456c34441f0b6d47a5a404bb6baf03745: And yet, an ally who hides in darkness is no true ally at all.
textByHash.3c3d42e25e4065cd324f18f723ed00bbf6c5d06b: Adventurer, you say this Evelot is part of the Khazard Army?
textByHash.578832b06ba0f7428774675db11c0422e07808f7: Then I think it's time to make my return known to my Mahjarrat kin. Clivet, summon Khazard. Let us see what he has to say of this.
textByHash.89a3cd425c51f4b11a9128cede67913397832148: Well then, I suggest you prepare yourself.
textByHash.c680b852963a4ca8466c9a17263697f57c51b9b8: And yet you made no attempt to aid me yourself. Too busy claiming my lands as your own, perhaps?
textByHash.3aa4613eef6e2c1f1d8d45d994165330a5e4dd98: Enough! This human is no friend of mine either, but he has presented me with information regarding my return that warrants investigation.
textByHash.fadbd35066f3d1111ae06d1306a5521252930b2b: Enough! This human is no friend of mine either, but she has presented me with information regarding my return that warrants investigation.
textByHash.b6984bcc43b730abb0fb035608ef4455b1bbfbe6: Make no mistake, if the human crosses me, I will gouge out his eyes and watch as he dines on them. Until then, he may be of use.
textByHash.1706d4e42038f0f341263ed903a6dc33f991e532: Make no mistake, if the human crosses me, I will gouge out her eyes and watch as he dines on them. Until then, he may be of use.
textByHash.4d48abce47a49e9c2a6a2e16bcc7761649e4af12: Make no mistake, if the human crosses me, I will gouge out his eyes and watch as she dines on them. Until then, he may be of use.
textByHash.9675e7ad1db76971ee9a829557f1b75616956b0e: Make no mistake, if the human crosses me, I will gouge out her eyes and watch as she dines on them. Until then, he may be of use.
textByHash.caf08edd30f472299b3beaa2c94188ecdf2f9e23: Make no mistake, if the human crosses me, I will gouge out his eyes and watch as he dines on them. Until then, she may be of use.
textByHash.476c1edb71425a3d974b9fdaf6936b24f6f3f29c: Make no mistake, if the human crosses me, I will gouge out her eyes and watch as he dines on them. Until then, she may be of use.
textByHash.8b971407e130e56f1e36368552d3b6c9270ce412: Make no mistake, if the human crosses me, I will gouge out his eyes and watch as she dines on them. Until then, she may be of use.
textByHash.6c0f8aeb11191afb9139ec0a04fab317c1441812: Make no mistake, if the human crosses me, I will gouge out her eyes and watch as she dines on them. Until then, she may be of use.
textByHash.573245b3c31e13876b89dfd191fc218c5250dbfb: Adventurer, you have summoned me. I trust you understand that my work in the north is of the upmost urgency. I have little time for distractions.
textByHash.4c4b97716404ac54710aaacaf7f5ae227b747811: Curious. Alomone, I trust this was not our work?
textByHash.e896c6e1cbddc28dcd66ef7baa740bcd9463acd4: The actions of a coward. He will come to regret that.
textByHash.0b32c41bdbe27cd6e7b3fc51556d860640aaa059: And you believe they were attempting to frame my followers and I as well?
textByHash.869eefe1d57e06a9ef9213a3ab1cde43b57949bd: A question with many possible answers, my faithful servant.
textByHash.89fb408bc5b8f30b75cbbb98a33b50e81d812d63: Then let us see what my Mahjarrat kin has to say about this. Alomone, summon Khazard.
textByHash.bdf3a12b33cdd53974376a9878977ad79d4018a8: Enough! I care not for your petty disagreements. This adventurer is under my protection. You are not to harm him.
textByHash.1f76627445265d695c20b2a9fc32313038822977: Enough! I care not for your petty disagreements. This adventurer is under my protection. You are not to harm her.
textByHash.e4f2a8dfc2e7317dea5509829eae34dc82aa18a5: And if he does, I will gouge out his eyes and watch as he dines on them. Until then, cease this prattle.
textByHash.7464cb835be9773a21d5b61aea9e4f7e185c9099: And if she does, I will gouge out his eyes and watch as he dines on them. Until then, cease this prattle.
textByHash.615c9c2bd84ac72a7d7fd4477bb242e33a54a6e0: And if he does, I will gouge out her eyes and watch as he dines on them. Until then, cease this prattle.
textByHash.adddece47a9959252a0883bd80c94bbbf1db473a: And if she does, I will gouge out her eyes and watch as he dines on them. Until then, cease this prattle.
textByHash.9f4fba2737577608d3b25139961e3e6ae29f7b21: And if he does, I will gouge out his eyes and watch as she dines on them. Until then, cease this prattle.
textByHash.8be04603cabc5659401310f71007b44a71e95110: And if she does, I will gouge out his eyes and watch as she dines on them. Until then, cease this prattle.
textByHash.4ecb1b9e57aefc631a1fb4a9e62882df09af34f2: And if he does, I will gouge out her eyes and watch as she dines on them. Until then, cease this prattle.
textByHash.b6fdb8d0de5e1bd02788d5fb6a00aa0a2c762d15: And if she does, I will gouge out her eyes and watch as she dines on them. Until then, cease this prattle.
textByHash.2a5f8747b335b1206f0d4a31f50ec5a726ee438c: Someone has murdered Ceril Carnillean and attempted to pass the blame onto one of your minions. Were you aware of this?
textByHash.8fa17516a1a79714c8431433fd49a461c9a9d0bf: I shed no tears for his demise, and if his killer turns out to be a friend, I will reward them with riches beyond imagination. However, this individual and their motives remain unknown. We must rectify that.
textByHash.6dd2b99f787aa86dfe679d5fcd30571dda97bd2d: No. Any individual involving themselves in our affairs, be they friend or foe, must be made known to us, especially as the ritual draws near.
textByHash.9da8519443bea08b6de250ab99237e0e11719d82: Adventurer, how thorough has the investigation into Ceril Carnillean's murder been?
textByHash.54b232c467d2f0132a4a0e7dff36dd13ad80e199: No stone can be left unturned. Adventurer, you must return to the Carnillean Mansion and uncover any information you might have missed.
textByHash.7c62869baec8de50d1e17303502408d7c2ca8d57: This is not up for debate. I have made my will clear. Return to us once you have something, adventurer. Not before.
textByHash.62d84454c0dae27609bc47dd1e8fbd1b6301cfb1: You came to me, not the other way around. From that, I would assume that you already have some sort of motive in finding this killer. I care not what that motive is.
textByHash.c11bfb5496d82ab45409b4e931696510682c6faa: Loyalty means very little to my kind. You opposed me before, but now you have a chance to rectify that mistake. Do so, and you will be rewarded. Oppose me again, and you will die.
textByHash.af51593d6260a4c9e6cf87e92c8a0ffafb2ffbb2: Loyalty means very little to my kind. Still, without you, I might never have been awoken from my slumber.
textByHash.f91c3e3a77c2878f07b852caa1af31b1049c676b: Continue to support me and you will continue to be rewarded. The moment you oppose me, however, is the moment you die.
textByHash.d2e30f94766fee19cbcb20453ee10e8a2ccb993a: Thousands. To have lived as long as I is to have made many friends, and many enemies. Any one of them may be responsible. Without further information, it is pointless to speculate.
textByHash.5e703b468516f081a4beb0adef3080e5e6dba6d2: It is nothing you need to concern yourself with.
textByHash.0a1ddb411e2cf72c3c9cf8985e0ce78c6fc0a370: You can be of ample help by performing the task you've been assigned. This idle chatter achieves nothing.
textByHash.a2b75016b921147807f2e4391d432fe879a0c468: Adventurer, you have work to do. Go to the Carnillean Mansion and uncover any information you might have missed. Return to us once you have something. Not before.
textByHash.ce58a75c9558d6163e6b4531a091d9f64df12157: The adventurer returns. I trust this means you have something of note for us.
textByHash.5aa70ddb408fffbe4ad4ed873bac3e96895f8322: This chest, was there nothing else inside?
textByHash.63f6ef200168fd543f64f0ad1c9ff54322d6522d: The crest must have been in there.
textByHash.ee6cfd5478dac24f2af2abece746cb05d58f4812: The Carnilleans must have claimed it after my defeat. The fools would have had no idea of its importance.
textByHash.5b1af211f6872b4178d014bd696b5f831564735b: Quite possibly, though there are others who would know of it.
textByHash.d699ecb3fea654fd667705100f2e22c3aef4e053: I agree, but our next move is clear. We must go north.
textByHash.91fff2c75d5ff240cab22e52f64cb3490c4ea9cf: Adventurer, your work is done. Leave us.
textByHash.9fd2796a7114325b7d4ad0261b7d469b91ab6658: Khazard and I will deal with this matter now. As a reward for your work, consider your past transgressions against us forgiven. Now go.
textByHash.d1459df22787c57f37f83d2ad37091631f24789e: Khazard and I will deal with this matter now. Once again, you have proven yourself a worthy ally to my followers and I. Now go.
textByHash.508c0d8b9af4da6969e69d4326fcee47deb5cbed: Hold on. Adventurer, you know of these trolls and their lands?
textByHash.85e4a51d9fa81cc68ddf270ae786dc9143e8834d: If the human knows these ice trolls, he may still be of use to us.
textByHash.3ab11d7557935e3a2ec0dae726900f4a93ac84f7: If the human knows these ice trolls, she may still be of use to us.
textByHash.6885e2fed487bbe280f7801edcf168f497048882: Until we know more about who we are dealing with, we should avoid attracting unneeded attention.
textByHash.5e42269a474ceaba4a1c0919d4bf157094a48676: There are others who dwell in the Shadow Realm. I would prefer they be kept unaware of our presence in the north.
textByHash.56af7a9253cbcfe9b0b20eb1d11e961526234e0f: Adventurer, it seems we have further need of you after all. Meet us outside this troll settlement. Don't make us wait.
textByHash.41828a18164cee82784749a2ba1f4fe9ad6d3506: Alomone, in our absence, I trust you can take care of that matter we spoke of.
textByHash.4a6a79c255d86a4565c6d00d9e5f19b33fdbd371: Good. Now, adventurer, it seems we have further need of you after all. Meet us outside this troll settlement. Don't make us wait.
textByHash.d6519198b0555d2cb463c089457579ee56176a41: Again with this, Khazard? He has been of great benefit so far. As long as that continues, he will remain.
textByHash.8559992a76e425c306266024d2a4f64e2412f847: Again with this, Khazard? She has been of great benefit so far. As long as that continues, he will remain.
textByHash.3bd8a89d4ea2be0914e55ad0ad954f1b993f5df4: Again with this, Khazard? He has been of great benefit so far. As long as that continues, she will remain.
textByHash.a8eaf5179b18ffe29583ed9e75dfcc6cbf1d9f52: Again with this, Khazard? She has been of great benefit so far. As long as that continues, she will remain.
textByHash.8192d676b8fe3b0cb73708d1fae397c57a76c4f2: No, and let us thank Zamorak for that.
textByHash.276af41ed81ef57793649a699f02d97ca9f8a4c8: Adventurer, let us investigate. Khazard, stay here and guard the entrance.
textByHash.d57aa0a4a31f395f51d36d2fc9c7e28000006788: Curious. Why would they come here with only half the crest?
textByHash.a20ec24ded4ef3971c6fc8f9120e0c433e021552: Possible, but unlikely. It should be clear to anyone that both halves are needed. I wonder...
textByHash.7cdcbc50af3bebfe9c1df942c778fe175b06b504: As I mentioned earlier, the other half was held by one of my kin. My kind have the ability to sense each other, but we have not felt his presence for a long time now.
textByHash.2d1e844fce183ab6a286979652f1f30bae853c8d: That was my initial assumption, but it is unusual that we have not felt his passing either. It's possible he is masking his presence instead.
textByHash.288a265427abba2f1dd6bda967953dccf9b0ca8f: It's no easy feat, but it can be done. As fate would have it, we stand in a place where our senses mean nothing.
textByHash.f6e58b44cf563234ab3ae721f966455be3a28840: While foolish to do so, he would have good reason to hide himself in this area.
textByHash.ac79b0bffa2f6abbab914205fef70edb07557f3f: This assassin must be found. I will remain here and ensure no one enters or leaves. You will search the rest of this dungeon and see what you can find.
textByHash.810eb3a8b25ba25bb6742d641d30446fd58ecdda: Our rejuvenation ritual takes place right above us. There have been times in the past when the weaker of our number have tried to hide themselves nearby.
textByHash.f40933d9084dacbe52f746f5c7e456f575080da9: To claim power from the ritual without the risk of being chosen as the sacrifice.
textByHash.1f1bb40224b96d633719fc1e67c4ad4e1d0786c5: You are correct. When the Empty Lord fell, he was one of the few foolish enough to remain loyal. His decision not to join Lord Zamorak left him with few friends. He has slowly grown weak ever since.
textByHash.51fa7d08cb2dfe0cfb5053292a321e32fdc63e6c: The prison was sealed long ago by two of my traitorous kin. They did so to prevent a great horror from escaping, but it is believed by some that a powerful artefact was also sealed inside.
textByHash.116baf311d710ca278369c81fce470a202e92bfa: Most likely. However, his attempts to claim it will risk unleashing what lies within.
textByHash.2f7393fa2cc12745e3210c1d8741931ae5a28b45: In an ideal world, I would see this artefact claimed in the name of Zamorak. But to risk unleashing an abomination of the Fallen Empire when the ritual is so close would not be wise.
textByHash.b3469c982cbb24b589334901966d251c480d8aae: That is none of your business. I have been generous enough to share a great deal of information with you so far, but I will not allow you to pry into personal matters.
textByHash.2c54773d55a157089e222ffe8dc1a54afd2b4120: And have I not already been stopping him from doing so? Besides, his anger is not without cause. You wronged him, did you not?
textByHash.3e4461d49ed058c8dad48e352643f0bb6739739c: Yes, but you would be wise not to mistake my mercy for weakness. I am willing to forgive you for your past transgressions as I believe you can be of use.
textByHash.b12b5a85477b4414f4547978758fed92673c5307: However, if I come to regret my choice, your fate will make the fires of Infernus seem welcoming in comparison.
textByHash.364f1e63c9c0d22739eed83aa759f20a23a47f93: If you do not have the stomach for certain... unpleasantries, you should not have allied yourself with me, either.
textByHash.5212700aebaa5335c30bffb0bb52c34fc4c1fa91: Perhaps, but I trust you do not mistake that for weakness. If you wrong me, your fate will make the fires of Infernus seem welcoming in comparison.
textByHash.e5be4b58d7e28beb6d23e3c8f540ddd3bc743ca2: Adventurer, we must find the assassin. Search the rest of this dungeon and see what you can find.
textByHash.3629fd6476d06d1f5f1e871fad76bf1882435970: Adventurer, have you found the assassin?
textByHash.2f330af6acf3e9fafef47696732d7bf5df230652: Then he now has everything he needs to enter the prison.
textByHash.21b35c2771f76932257775579d6182168a39dda6: No good will come out of going in there. We have failed.
textByHash.f68e58a3493cb197b19d2ac4b235500376d5d9ad: Guards will need positioning here to warn us if this assassin remerges. Until then, we can only hope that he meets a swift end in the prison.
textByHash.81837e6e4c28d05c49e0ba7d4fcdf65b35453d9b: Still a prisoner of this assassin, no doubt. To what end, who can say.
textByHash.2e7abbadecb074e9d2ee296c73be3d8e73e5f06c: No. Word will be sent to you if there are any developments, but for now, you should leave. I suggest you return to the authorities in Ardougne and inform them that their killer will not be found.
textByHash.4c7365f12ede96e350670619e4c3fe7b246700c2: And perhaps one day they will be answered, but to dwell on them now achieves nothing.
textByHash.061a644425e4049cca9fa9a134641576282399c8: Agreed. Adventurer, we are done here. If you wish, I can provide you with a teleport to Ardougne.
textByHash.5b57419b24187858db83570d1332c66c81bd13d3: Adventurer, we are done here. If you wish, I can provide you with a teleport to Ardougne.
textByHash.effcd03c8e451775a51d41cc03e8a21f7ac8c345: Adventurer, we are done here. You should return to Ardougne.
